items.title: 2 Reasons to Watch TRV and 1 to Stay Cautious
items.description: Travelers trades at $291.86 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 10.4% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 8.6%.

items.title: TRV Stock Near 52-Week High: A Signal for Investors to Hold Tight?
items.description: Travelers' momentum in moderating auto premiums, resilient investment income and strong capital is likely to sustain its earnings growth.
